assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md preserves the existing trustify-backend entry in the Repository Registry unchanged (same Role, Serena Instance, Path values as in claude-md-configured.md)
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 16: '| trustify-backend | Rust backend service | serena_backend | /home/user/trustify-backend |' matches claude-md-configured.md line 16 exactly.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md adds a new trustify-ui entry to the Repository Registry with serena_ui as the Serena Instance
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 17: '| trustify-ui | TypeScript frontend | serena_ui | /home/user/trustify-ui |' — new row with serena_ui as the Serena Instance.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md preserves all existing Jira Configuration fields unchanged — Project key remains TC, Cloud ID, Feature issue type ID remain as in claude-md-configured.md
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 20-24 match claude-md-configured.md lines 20-24 exactly: Project key: TC, Cloud ID: 2b9e35e3-6bd3-4cec-b838-f4249ee02432, Feature issue type ID: 10142, Git Pull Request custom field: customfield_10875, GitHub Issue custom field: customfield_10747.

assertion_results.text: outputs/changes-log.md explicitly identifies which entries were preserved (existing) and which were added (new)
assertion_results.evidence: changes-log.md has '## Preserved (no changes)' section listing trustify-backend row, all Jira fields, and Code Intelligence content as preserved. '## Added' section lists new row 'trustify-ui | TypeScript frontend | serena_ui | /home/user/trustify-ui' and new serena_ui limitation entry.

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md notes that serena_backend was already configured and serena_ui is newly discovered
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md Step 2: serena_backend — 'Status: Already in Repository Registry. No action needed.' serena_ui — 'Status: NOT in Repository Registry. Needs to be added.'

assertion_results.text: The existing Code Intelligence section content (naming convention, example, serena_backend limitations) is preserved — only new serena_ui content is added
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 28-42 preserve the original naming convention text, mcp__serena_backend__find_symbol example, and serena_backend limitation ('rust-analyzer may take 30-60 seconds to index on first use') verbatim from the original. Only addition is line 43: '- `serena_ui`: No known limitations'.

User response: Declined. Action: Skipped Security Configuration setup.' changes-log.md confirms: 'User declined to enable security triage.
